final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing step-by-step infographic for deploying Hermes in a Docker container and integrating with GLMCodingPlan, intended for a technical tutorial or documentation page.

Style/medium: technical infographic, step-by-step diagram
Composition: 4 numbered panels arranged vertically, each panel showing a distinct step with visual icons and concise labels
Subject: Step 1 — Docker environment setup and Hermes image pull; Step 2 — Container initialization and Hermes configuration; Step 3 — GLMCodingPlan integration setup; Step 4 — Final verification and connection test
Scene/backdrop: clean documentation-style layout with subtle container/Docker visual motifs
Lighting/mood: clear, instructional, professional
Color palette: blue and white tech palette with accent colors for step numbers
Materials/textures: flat vector illustration style with clean lines
Text (verbatim): 1, 2, 3, 4 step markers; "Hermes"; "Docker"; "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: 4 distinct steps clearly numbered, technical accuracy in deployment sequence
Avoid: overly decorative elements, cluttered layout, ambiguous step boundaries
